race.comment: PRORATA (3) back from a long layoff with a slashing return, running on from back in the field with a close-up fifth over 1100m at Warwick Farm in BM64 grade. Leading apprentice rides and can put these away. BAYCAT (2) covered a stack of ground first-up and never looked comfortable on the tight track with a battling last over 1000m at Queanbeyan. Placed here last prep and the senior rider goes aboard. Can return to form. CHEAP SHOT (9) kept fresh for his and his best form is over this trip. Will go back from the gate and be ridden for luck. ZAHDI (1) improved effort at latest when she chipped away late to run third here over 1200m in BM66 class. Worth thought from the low draw.
